title: Where notes are saved
question: Where should the app keep a user's notes?
rationale: A local file on the device is the fastest to build and works offline from day one, which is all an early version needs. Syncing and accounts can come later (see the next decisions) without changing this foundation.

tradeoffs.note: nothing to set up — just read and write a file
stays on one device until we add sync
needs a connection to read or write
a server, accounts, and hosting to run
